name: Trend Analysis
description: Identifies, monitors, and interprets emerging and declining patterns in advertising performance, consumer behavior, and market dynamics to inform strategic decisions.

variables.name: metrics
variables.description: Key performance metrics to analyze (ROAS, CTR, CPA, impressions, etc.)

variables.name: time_range
variables.description: Time period for analysis: last 3 months, past year, 2-year trend

variables.name: granularity
variables.description: Data frequency: daily, weekly, monthly (default: monthly)

variables.name: industry_context
variables.description: Any known market events, seasonality, or competitive activity during the period

inputs.name: metrics
inputs.description: Key performance metrics to analyze (ROAS, CTR, CPA, impressions, etc.)

inputs.name: time_range
inputs.description: Time period for analysis: last 3 months, past year, 2-year trend

inputs.name: granularity
inputs.description: Data frequency: daily, weekly, monthly (default: monthly)

inputs.name: industry_context
inputs.description: Any known market events, seasonality, or competitive activity during the period
